rulings.Case Title: DEMAS YAN VS. LI MING LEI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-08-478364, CGC-08-478815 WITH CASE CGC-07-467500
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, September 1, 2010, line 1, DEFENDANT TONY FU'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-08-478364, CGC-08-478815 WITH CASE CGC-07-467500 IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 22, 2010 PER AMENDED MOTION SET FOR THAT DATE. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: VIRGINIA BALDOVIESO VS. KEN WOO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Untimely Demurrer To Third Amended Complaint, Or In The Alternative, Untimely Responsive Pleading To Complaint And For Award Of Sanction Sper Ccp 128.5
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, September 1, 2010, line 2, PLAINTIFF VIRGINIA BALDOVIESOS Motion To Strike Untimely Demurrer To Third Amended Complaint, Or In The Alternative, Untimely Responsive Pleading To Complaint And For Award Of Sanction Sper CCP 128.5. THE COURT TREATS THE MOTION TO STRIKE AS THE OPPOSITION TO DEMURRER. THE COURT DENIES THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS FOR NONCOMPLIANCE WITH THE SAFE HARBOR PROVISION IN CCP SECTION 128.7. CCP SECTION 128.5 IS NOT APPLICABLE. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: VIRGINIA BALDOVIESO VS. KEN WOO et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, September 1, 2010, line 2, DEFENDANTS KENNETH WOO AND MEA FINANCIAL SERVICES DBA ALL CITY FINANCIAL DEMURRER TO THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEMURRER OVERRULED AS UNTIMELY. (CCP SECTION 430.40) =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: REBECCA B. MANCE VS. STATE FARM INSURANCE COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, September 1, 2010, line 3, PLAINTIFF REBECCA MANCE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR, FAILURE TO PROVIDE SUFFICIENT NOTICE UNDER CCP 437c(a). =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: PATRICIA ZEVALLOS VS. MARILYN CHAVEZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, September 1, 2010, line 12, DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 10 DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER. DEMURRER RAISES ISSUES OF FACT NOT PROPERLY DECIDED ON DEMURRER. SUBSTANTIVE REPLY RAISES DEFENSE NOT THROUGHLY DEVELOPED IN DEMURRER THAT MAY BE RAISED IN A SUBSEQUENT MOTION. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, BY AND THROUGH, VS. CARL ERNST JR
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, September 1, 2010, line 7, PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT WHETHER DEFENDANT ABANDONED THE LEASE. SEE VALLELY INVESTMENT, L.P. V. BANCAMERICA COMMERICAL CORP. (2001) 88 CAL.APP.4TH 816. DEMPSEY DECLARATION STRICKEN. HOWEVER DEFENDANT'S DECLARATION AND LANGUAGE OF LEASE PARAGRAPH 21.1 RAISE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT WHETHER A TRANSFER OCCURRED. =(302/CWW)
